_readme: Hand-drawn artwork for the CWM class icons. 143 classes.
Every glyph is drawn centred on (12,12) inside the 12x12 field x 6..18, y 6..18.
Inheritance is NOT encoded by a separate mark - related classes instead share
glyph CONSTRUCTION (the folder, the note, the cube, the tag, the hexagon, the grid).
'g' is the raw SVG fragment. Strokes inherit currentColor; solid areas set

objectmodel/core/Element.note: the root of everything: a bare rounded cell

objectmodel/core/ModelElement.note: Element that has a name: the cell gains a label

objectmodel/core/Namespace.note: a naming scope: named members listed inside
objectmodel/core/Namespace.g: <rect x='6.2' y='6.6' width='11.6' height='10.8' rx='1.6'/><circle cx='9.4' cy='10.4' r='1.1' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><circle cx='9.4' cy='14' r='1.1' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><path d='M11.8 10.4h4.4M11.8 14h3'/>

objectmodel/core/Package.note: folder - the generic container. Base motif for all Package descendants

objectmodel/core/Model.note: the top-level Package: folder with a solid core

objectmodel/core/Subsystem.note: a grouping that is both Classifier and Package: a box holding boxes

objectmodel/core/Classifier.note: abstract type box: name compartment only

objectmodel/core/Class.note: UML class box: name compartment + feature compartment

objectmodel/core/DataType.note: type tag. Base motif for TypeAlias and the SQL type family

objectmodel/core/Feature.note: a member of a classifier: hollow marker + bar, between faint neighbours

objectmodel/core/StructuralFeature.note: SIBLING of Feature: the marker gains a core (it holds structure)
objectmodel/core/StructuralFeature.g: <path d='M6.4 7.8h11.2M6.4 16.2h11.2' opacity='.3'/><circle cx='8.4' cy='12' r='1.35'/><circle cx='8.4' cy='12' r='.5' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><path d='M11.1 12h6.5'/>

objectmodel/core/Attribute.note: SIBLING of Feature: solid marker + bar - a concrete named slot
objectmodel/core/Attribute.g: <path d='M6.4 7.8h11.2M6.4 16.2h11.2' opacity='.3'/><circle cx='8.4' cy='12' r='1.35' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><path d='M11.1 12h6.5'/>

objectmodel/core/Constraint.note: braces enclosing a subject. Base motif for CheckConstraint

objectmodel/core/Dependency.note: client depends on supplier: dashed arrow between two nodes

objectmodel/core/Expression.note: parentheses around an operand. Base motif for the expression siblings
objectmodel/core/Expression.g: <path d='M9.6 6.2q-4 5.8 0 11.6M14.4 6.2q4 5.8 0 11.6'/><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='1.6' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/>

objectmodel/core/BooleanExpression.note: SIBLING of Expression: the operand becomes a truth check

objectmodel/core/ProcedureExpression.note: SIBLING of Expression: the operand becomes something executable

objectmodel/core/Multiplicity.g: <path d='M8.6 6.6h-2v10.8h2M15.4 6.6h2v10.8h-2'/><circle cx='9.9' cy='12' r='1.1' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><circle cx='14.1' cy='12' r='1.1' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><path d='M11.4 12h1.2'/>

objectmodel/core/MultiplicityRange.note: SIBLING of Multiplicity: lower bound solid, upper bound open, span between
objectmodel/core/MultiplicityRange.g: <path d='M8.6 6.6h-2v10.8h2M15.4 6.6h2v10.8h-2'/><path d='M9.6 12h4.8'/><circle cx='9.6' cy='12' r='1.1' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><circle cx='14.4' cy='12' r='1.1'/>

objectmodel/core/TaggedValue.note: a tag bound to a value

objectmodel/behavioral/BehavioralFeature.note: hexagon - a member that does something. Base motif for Method/Operation

objectmodel/behavioral/Method.note: SIBLING: hexagon with a solid core - an implementation
objectmodel/behavioral/Method.g: <path d='M12 6.2 17.2 9.1v5.8L12 17.8 6.8 14.9V9.1z'/><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='1.8' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/>

objectmodel/behavioral/Operation.note: SIBLING: hexagon with a hollow core - a specification

objectmodel/behavioral/Parameter.note: a typed slot passed across a boundary

objectmodel/behavioral/Argument.note: a value handed to a parameter

objectmodel/behavioral/Event.note: a burst. Base motif for the whole warehouse event family

objectmodel/instance/Instance.note: a note card. Base motif for Object / DataValue / the value families

objectmodel/instance/Object.note: SIBLING: an instance with identity - a solid body
objectmodel/instance/Object.g: <path d='M6.9 6.4h6.2l4 4v7.2H6.9z'/><path d='M13.1 6.4v4h4'/><rect x='9.2' y='12.4' width='3.6' height='3.6' rx='.6' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/>

objectmodel/instance/DataValue.note: SIBLING: an instance that is pure value - a solid dot
objectmodel/instance/DataValue.g: <path d='M6.9 6.4h6.2l4 4v7.2H6.9z'/><path d='M13.1 6.4v4h4'/><circle cx='11' cy='14.2' r='1.8' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/>

objectmodel/instance/Slot.note: a place where a feature's value sits - empty

objectmodel/instance/DataSlot.note: SIBLING of Slot: the slot is filled with a value
objectmodel/instance/DataSlot.g: <rect x='6' y='8.6' width='12' height='6.8' rx='1.4'/><path d='M8.2 12h3.4'/><circle cx='14.8' cy='12' r='1.7' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/>

objectmodel/instance/Extent.note: a Package holding instances: folder with instances inside
objectmodel/instance/Extent.g: <path d='M6 16.5V7.5a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h3.1l1.6 2H17a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v7a1 1 0 0 1-1 1H7a1 1 0 0 1-1-1z'/><circle cx='10.2' cy='13.6' r='1.3' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><circle cx='13.8' cy='13.6' r='1.3' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/>

objectmodel/relationships/AssociationEnd.note: SIBLING: one end of that association, marked
objectmodel/relationships/AssociationEnd.g: <rect x='6.2' y='9' width='4.6' height='6' rx='.8'/><path d='M10.8 12h3.6'/><path d='M14.4 12l1.7-1.7 1.7 1.7-1.7 1.7z' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/>

objectmodel/relationships/Generalization.note: the UML hollow triangle pointing at the parent

foundation/businessinformation/Responsib.note: a party - person, role or organisation - accountable for model elements

foundation/businessinformation/Contact.note: an address card gathering ways to reach a party

foundation/businessinformation/Document.note: an external document referenced by an element

foundation/businessinformation/Location.note: map pin. Base motif for Site

foundation/businessinformation/ResourceL.note: a globe: a URL out on the network

foundation/softwaredeployment/Component.note: the UML component with its two ears. Base motif for the deployed family

foundation/softwaredeployment/DeployedCo.note: SIBLING: a component that has been put somewhere

foundation/softwaredeployment/DataManage.note: SIBLING: a deployed component that manages data - it gains a store

foundation/softwaredeployment/DataProvid.note: SIBLING: a DataManager that also serves data outward

foundation/softwaredeployment/DeployedSo.note: a system, installed: two stacked shells

foundation/softwaredeployment/SoftwareSy.note: SIBLING of Subsystem: a system with its parts and a baseline

foundation/softwaredeployment/Machine.note: host tower with slots and a power indicator
foundation/softwaredeployment/Machine.g: <rect x='7.6' y='6' width='8.8' height='12' rx='1.2'/><path d='M9.9 8.8h4.2M9.9 11.1h4.2'/><circle cx='12' cy='14.8' r='1.15' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/>

foundation/softwaredeployment/Site.note: SIBLING of Location: a pin standing on ground

foundation/softwaredeployment/PackageUsa.note: SIBLING of Dependency: one package uses another

foundation/softwaredeployment/ProviderCo.note: two halves of a connector meeting

foundation/keysindexes/UniqueKey.note: key with a hollow bow. Base motif for UniqueConstraint / PrimaryKey

foundation/keysindexes/Index.note: ordered entries with a lookup arrow. Base motif for SQLIndex

foundation/keysindexes/IndexedFeature.note: the one feature an index points at

foundation/datatypes/TypeAlias.note: SIBLING of DataType: a tag that stands for another type

resource/relational/Catalog.note: database cylinder - unit of logon and SQL statement scope

resource/relational/Schema.note: folder holding a grid - a named collection of tables

resource/relational/ColumnSet.note: the bare set of columns. Base motif for Table / View / QueryColumnSet

resource/relational/NamedColumnSet.note: SIBLING: a ColumnSet that carries a name

resource/relational/Table.note: SIBLING: grid with a MATERIALIZED (filled) header band
resource/relational/Table.g: <path d='M7 6h10a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v2.4H6V7a1 1 0 0 1 1-1z' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><rect x='6' y='6' width='12' height='12' rx='1'/><path d='M6 9.4h12M6 13.7h12M10.2 9.4V18M14 9.4V18'/>

resource/relational/View.note: SIBLING of Table: identical grid, hollow header, dashed body = non-materialized
resource/relational/View.g: <rect x='6' y='6' width='12' height='12' rx='1'/><path d='M6 9.4h12'/><path d='M6 13.7h12M10.2 9.4V18M14 9.4V18' stroke-dasharray='1.6 1.4'/>

resource/relational/QueryColumnSet.note: SIBLING: a ColumnSet produced by a query

resource/relational/Column.note: SIBLING-DUAL of Row: same grid, middle COLUMN filled
resource/relational/Column.g: <path d='M10.2 6.5h3.8v11h-3.8z' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' opacity='.9'/><rect x='6' y='6' width='12' height='12' rx='1'/><path d='M6 9.4h12M6 13.7h12M10.2 6V18M14 6V18'/>

resource/relational/Row.note: SIBLING-DUAL of Column: same grid, middle ROW filled
resource/relational/Row.g: <path d='M6.5 9.5h11v4.1h-11z' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' opacity='.9'/><rect x='6' y='6' width='12' height='12' rx='1'/><path d='M6 9.4h12M6 13.7h12M10.2 6V18M14 6V18'/>

resource/relational/RowSet.note: an Extent of rows: a container of stacked rows

resource/relational/ColumnValue.note: SIBLING of DataValue: the note holds one column's value

resource/relational/PrimaryKey.note: SIBLING of UniqueKey: FILLED bow - the one identifying key

resource/relational/UniqueConstraint.note: SIBLING of PrimaryKey: hollow bow - unique but not identifying

resource/relational/ForeignKey.note: SIBLING of the keys: hollow bow, shaft ends in a ring = points at another key

resource/relational/CheckConstraint.note: SIBLING of Constraint: the braces enclose a check

resource/relational/SQLIndex.note: SIBLING of Index, in SQL colours

resource/relational/SQLIndexColumn.note: SIBLING of IndexedFeature: the indexed column

resource/relational/Procedure.note: SIBLING of Method: a hexagon that runs

resource/relational/SQLParameter.note: SIBLING of Parameter, in SQL colours

resource/relational/Trigger.note: lightning bolt - fires on events at the table

resource/relational/SQLDataType.note: SIBLING of DataType: abstract root of the SQL type system

resource/relational/SQLSimpleType.note: SIBLING: same tag, solid hole, plus a scalar bar

resource/relational/SQLDistinctType.note: SIBLING: a tag whose value is set apart from its base type

resource/relational/SQLStructuredType.note: SIBLING: a tag whose value has internal structure

resource/record/RecordDef.note: record card with ordered fields - cross-package contrast to relational/Table

resource/record/Field.note: SIBLING of Attribute: one field of the record, emphasised
resource/record/Field.g: <rect x='6' y='6' width='12' height='12' rx='1.5'/><path d='M8.6 9.4h6.8M8.6 14.6h4.1' opacity='.35'/><path d='M8.6 12h6.8' stroke-width='2.2'/>

resource/record/FixedOffsetField.note: SIBLING of Field: the field sits at a fixed offset from the start

resource/record/Group.note: a brace gathering fields into a structure

resource/record/RecordFile.note: a Package of records on disk

resource/record/Record.note: SIBLING of Object: one record instance

resource/record/RecordSet.note: SIBLING of Extent: a stack of record instances

resource/record/FieldValue.note: SIBLING of DataValue: the note holds one field's value

analysis/olap/Cube.note: isometric cube. Base motif for the whole cube family

analysis/olap/CubeRegion.note: SIBLING: one region of the cube, shaded
analysis/olap/CubeRegion.g: <path d='M12 12.1 18 8.8v6.4L12 18.4z' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' opacity='.3'/><path d='M12 5.6 18 8.8v6.4L12 18.4 6 15.2V8.8z' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M6 8.8 12 12.1l6-3.3M12 12.1v6.3'/>

analysis/olap/CubeDeployment.note: SIBLING: the cube, put onto a resource

analysis/olap/CubeDimensionAssociation.note: SIBLING: the cube bound to one of its axes

analysis/olap/DimensionDeployment.note: SIBLING of Dimension: the axis, put onto a resource

analysis/olap/Hierarchy.note: abstract tree of levels. Base motif for the two hierarchy kinds

analysis/olap/LevelBasedHierarchy.note: SIBLING: the tree, organised into level bands

analysis/olap/ValueBasedHierarchy.note: SIBLING: the tree, defined by parent/child values - it folds back on itself

analysis/olap/HierarchyLevelAssociation.note: SIBLING: a level bound into a hierarchy

analysis/olap/Level.note: one band of members. Base motif for CodedLevel

analysis/olap/CodedLevel.note: SIBLING of Level: its members carry codes

analysis/olap/MemberSelection.note: a set with some members picked out
analysis/olap/MemberSelection.g: <rect x='6.2' y='6.2' width='11.6' height='11.6' rx='2' opacity='.45'/><circle cx='9.4' cy='9.4' r='1.5'/><circle cx='14.6' cy='9.4' r='1.5' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><circle cx='9.4' cy='14.6' r='1.5' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><circle cx='14.6' cy='14.6' r='1.5'/>

analysis/olap/HierarchyMemberSelectionGr.note: SIBLING: that group, bound to a hierarchy

analysis/olap/Measure.note: SIBLING of Attribute: a measured quantity, with a scale

analysis/olap/Schema.note: a Package of cubes and dimensions

analysis/olap/StructureMap.note: SIBLING of TransformationMap: maps structure onto a resource

analysis/olap/ContentMap.note: SIBLING of TransformationMap: maps content onto a resource
analysis/olap/ContentMap.g: <rect x='6.2' y='8.6' width='4.4' height='6.8' rx='.8'/><rect x='13.4' y='8.6' width='4.4' height='6.8' rx='.8'/><path d='M10.6 12h2.8'/><path d='M12.4 11 13.6 12l-1.2 1'/><circle cx='8.4' cy='12' r='1.3' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><circle cx='15.6' cy='12' r='1.3' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/>

analysis/transformation/Transformation.note: a funnel: source reshaped into target. Base motif for the maps

analysis/transformation/TransformationMa.note: SIBLING: a transformation expressed as source/target pairs

analysis/businessnomenclature/Vocabulary.note: a labelled entry in a vocabulary. Base motif for Term / Concept

analysis/businessnomenclature/Term.note: SIBLING: the word itself, in quotes

analysis/businessnomenclature/Concept.note: SIBLING: the idea behind the word

analysis/businessnomenclature/Nomenclatu.note: a Package of vocabulary: an open book

analysis/businessnomenclature/Glossary.note: SIBLING: a book whose entries are defined

analysis/businessnomenclature/Taxonomy.note: SIBLING: a book whose entries form a hierarchy

analysis/businessnomenclature/BusinessDo.note: a Package scoping a business area

management/warehouseprocess/WarehousePro.note: abstract flow: one step feeding the next

management/warehouseprocess/WarehouseAct.note: SIBLING: a process that runs - the first node is live
management/warehouseprocess/WarehouseAct.g: <rect x='6.2' y='9.4' width='4.6' height='5.2' rx='1' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' opacity='.85'/><rect x='6.2' y='9.4' width='4.6' height='5.2' rx='1'/><rect x='13.2' y='9.4' width='4.6' height='5.2' rx='1'/><path d='M10.8 12h2.4'/><path d='M12.2 10.8 13.4 12l-1.2 1.2'/>

management/warehouseprocess/WarehouseSte.note: SIBLING: a single step inside an activity

management/warehouseprocess/events/Wareh.note: SIBLING of Event: the burst. Root of the event family

management/warehouseprocess/events/Exter.note: SIBLING: the burst is struck from outside

management/warehouseprocess/events/Inter.note: SIBLING: the burst is raised inside the system

management/warehouseprocess/events/Casca.note: SIBLING of InternalEvent: one event triggers the next

management/warehouseprocess/events/Retry.note: SIBLING of InternalEvent: the event comes round again

management/warehouseprocess/events/Sched.note: abstract clock. Base motif for the timed events

management/warehouseprocess/events/Point.note: SIBLING: the clock marks one instant
management/warehouseprocess/events/Point.g: <circle cx='12' cy='12' r='5.9'/><path d='M12 8.4V12l2.6 1.6'/><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='1.2' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/>

management/warehouseprocess/events/Inter.note: SIBLING: the clock marks a span

management/warehouseprocess/events/Recur.note: SIBLING of PointInTimeEvent: the instant repeats
management/warehouseprocess/events/Recur.g: <circle cx='11.8' cy='12.6' r='5.2'/><path d='M11.8 9.4v3.2l2.3 1.4'/><circle cx='11.8' cy='12.6' r='1.1' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><path d='M14.9 6.5h2.6v2.6'/>

management/warehouseprocess/events/Custo.note: SIBLING of PointInTimeEvent: the instant comes from a calendar
management/warehouseprocess/events/Custo.g: <rect x='6.2' y='7.6' width='11.6' height='10.2' rx='1.4'/><path d='M6.2 10.8h11.6'/><path d='M9.2 6.2v2.6M14.8 6.2v2.6'/><circle cx='12' cy='14.2' r='1.4' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/>

management/warehouseprocess/events/Calen.g: <rect x='6.2' y='7.6' width='11.6' height='10.2' rx='1.4'/><path d='M6.2 10.8h11.6'/><path d='M9.2 6.2v2.6M14.8 6.2v2.6'/><rect x='9.4' y='12.6' width='2.8' height='2.6' rx='.4' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/>

management/warehouseoperation/Transforma.note: abstract run: the funnel, timed. Base motif for the two executions

management/warehouseoperation/Measuremen.note: a gauge reading taken of an element
management/warehouseoperation/Measuremen.g: <path d='M5.9 12.6a6.1 6.1 0 0 1 12.2 0'/><path d='M12 12.6l3.4-3.9'/><circle cx='12' cy='12.6' r='1.2' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><path d='M9 17.6h6'/>

management/warehouseoperation/ChangeRequ.note: a document with a pencil - a proposed change
